# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

apiVersion: envoy.config.transport.v3
kind: TransportSocket
name: envoy.sock_socket
typedConfiguration:
  typeUrl: type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tcp.v3.TcpLiteConfig
  value: |
    {}
---
apiVersion: envoy.config.core.v3
kind: Cluster
name: my-cluster
connectTimeout: 0.25s
type: strict_dns
lbPolicy: round_robin
transportSockets:
- name: envoy.sock_socket
---
apiVersion: envoy.config.accessloggers.v3
kind: TcpLogging
admin:
  accessLog:
    errorLevel: verbose
    filter:
      matchCase: exact
      prefix: "envoy.admin"
  statsDStream:
    clusterName: my-cluster
    tagKey: envoy.cluster
---
apiVersion: envoy.config.control_plane.v3
kind: StatisticConfig
name: custom-stats
admin:
  transportSocketName: envoy.sock_socket
  address:
    socketAddress: { address: localhost, portValue: 19000 }
---
apiVersion: envoy.config.control_plane.v3
kind: AccessLogConfig
name: custom-accesslog
admin:
  transportSocketName: envoy.sock_socket
  address:
    socketAddress: { address: localhost, portValue: 19001 }
